title: Conversion-aesthetician audit pass: social cards, WCAG-AA contrast, thumb-zone targets
changes: New OG/Twitter image routes + favicon/apple-icon + theme-color so social shares stop rendering blank cards
Margin display shows two decimals under 1% so a -0.04% loss no longer reads as "0.0%"
Mobile hamburger and form inputs hit the 44px touch target
New --color-patina-muted token replaces a dozen sub-AA muted-text patterns site-wide
Waterfall chart loss colors moved into @theme tokens; sub-penny fees no longer render as "−$0.00" bars
pSEO pages fire pseo_page_viewed via a tiny client wrapper; hero gets a 3-point trust strip
Off-Site Ads fieldset reads context-first; \$10k+ checkbox conditionally renders
localStorage payload gains version + migrate() so future schema bumps don't reset returning visitors
Footer trims the Sitemap link

title: Add site chrome, About/Changelog/Embed pages, and Chrome extension
changes: (site) route group owns SiteHeader (sticky, wordmark + Categories/Embed/About,
Inline brand mark — five descending bars in patina, no asset pipeline.
Root layout slimmed to <html><body>; analytics moved into (site)/layout
/about — what this is, fee math (rates pulled live from lib/fees.ts
/changelog — TS-array source of truth, two seed entries.
/embed — info page with copy-paste iframe snippet, URL-param schema,
/embed/widget — bare Calculator with embedded prop. Disables analytics
next.config.mjs sets Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors * for
Searchparams-driven prefill (p, s, m, as, c, ads, t10).
noindex via metadata.robots so it doesn't compete with /embed in search.
Manifest V3 popup under extension/. Vite + React + Tailwind v4, @/ alias
post-build.mjs copies manifest.json + icons/ into dist/ after vite build.
Build verified: 66KB gzipped, fully offline-capable.
README documents local install + Web Store submission checklist.
llms.txt: new Tools & integrations section (embed page, widget URL with
llms-full.txt: prepends canonical About content (with live fee constants)
pSEO pages: new "Writing about {category} on Etsy?" CTA between MDX
sitemap adds /about, /embed, /changelog. /embed/widget excluded.
npm run typecheck: clean
npm test: 10/10 fee tests pass
npm run build: 32 prerendered routes (was 28)
/embed/widget headers confirmed: frame-ancestors * + X-Frame-Options ALLOWALL
extension build: 66KB gzipped, manifest + icons copied to dist/

title: UX forensic pass: fix loss-path rendering, kill mobile fold friction, wire Clarity
changes: WaterfallChart: SVG-based, horizontal layout, signed end bar, a11y title/desc + sr-only table mirror
Calculator: lazy useState merges URL+storage on first render; copy button width-locked
InputsPanel: string-state numeric inputs (no leading-0 trap, select-on-focus); $10k checkbox disabled when ads off
Pages: tighter mobile hero, "see my real profit" anchor, trust strip, all 20 pSEO entries linked, ads gated to env flag
lib/fees: smart percent formatter; lib/countries: rename EU to "Other (EU country)"
Clarity: conditional script in layout, gated on NEXT_PUBLIC_CLARITY_PROJECT_ID
Recharts removed from package.json (~90KB gzipped saved); add loading.tsx skeleton

title: Initial commit: Etsy Margin calculator MVP
changes: lib/fees.ts: pure fee math, 5 country processors (US/UK/CA/AU/EU)
10 Vitest unit tests covering every fee path and threshold
Recharts waterfall + URL-shareable inputs + localStorage defaults
20 prerendered pSEO pages with unique long-form MDX content
sitemap.ts, robots.ts, JSON-LD (FAQPage + SoftwareApplication)
llms.txt and llms-full.txt for AI crawler discovery
GA4 + Mediavine slots scaffolded (env-gated)
GitHub Actions CI: test + typecheck + build on every PR

title: Keep URL clean until the user actually edits an input
summary: A bare visit to etsymargin.tools was being rewritten to ?p=25&s=5&m=4&as=5&c=US&ads=1&t10=0 because the URL-sync effect fired with the default inputs on hydration. Gate the sync on a userEditedRef so the address bar stays clean until either an input is touched or the visit started with query params (a shared link, in which case we keep tracking).

title: Fix Off-Site Ads box not surrounding legend and waterfall value cutoff
changes: Replace fieldset/legend with div role=group + label paragraph; the legend's anonymous browser layout left the cream surface starting below the label text instead of around it
Waterfall value placement now estimates text width and tries right-of-bar → left-of-bar → inside-right-aligned, so narrow bars near the right edge no longer push their dollar amount past the SVG edge

title: Auto-generate changelog from git log; add lime-cream accents and card depth
changes: scripts/build-changelog.mjs reads git log into content/changelog.json on every prebuild; merges with existing JSON so shallow Vercel clones never lose history
Changelog page is now a static render of the JSON — no more hand-typed entries
Lime-cream accent moments: editorial kicker on the home hero ("4–6 fees stacked per Etsy sale") and category chips on the home grid
New `quiet-card` utility (subtle vertical gradient + layered shadow) applied to calculator panels, changelog, pSEO FAQ, and category cards so surfaces feel like surfaces, not flat boxes

title: Add Vertex Network hub page and blind footer link
changes: New /network page introduces the Vertex Network and lists sibling tools (currently shopifont.app); statically prerendered, canonical, OG metadata, CollectionPage JSON-LD with hasPart entries per tool
lib/network.ts is the single source of truth — sitemap, JSON-LD, and llms files all read from it, so adding a new tool only requires editing one array
Footer gets a subtle bottom row "Part of the Vertex Network" linking to /network (centered, muted text, no nofollow so equity flows)
Outbound tool links use target=_blank rel=noopener (no nofollow, no noreferrer — we want the SEO and the referer)
sitemap.ts adds /network at priority 0.5
llms.txt gains a Vertex Network section; llms-full.txt gains a full network description block so AI crawlers ingest the hub

title: Render Mediavine Grow as a plain <script> tag for SSR verification
summary: Next's <Script> wrapper rewrites the data-grow-initializer attribute Mediavine's verifier scrapes for, and afterInteractive defers the inline IIFE past the verification window. Drop the wrapper and emit a plain server-rendered <script data-grow-initializer="" dangerouslySetInnerHTML=...> so the snippet lands in the SSR HTML byte-for-byte.

title: Wire Vercel Analytics and Mediavine Grow alongside the existing Clarity hook
changes: @vercel/analytics installed and <Analytics /> mounted in (site)/layout so /embed/widget stays analytics-free
MediavineGrow component mirrors the Clarity pattern: data-grow-initializer attribute preserved, afterInteractive strategy, env-gated on NEXT_PUBLIC_GROW_ME_SITE_ID
